source: 2024 Guidelines for Admission for Holders of National Senior Certificate

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Social Science
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For several creative programmes, portfolio or audition performance is a leading indicator for admission.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: FPS 380 or above.

Notes: NSC endorsed for degree study or matric exemption is required.; Academic Literacy NBT score at Intermediate Level is required for possible admission.; Probable admission: WPS 450 or above with NBT AL Upper Intermediate or above.; Guaranteed admission: FPS 450 or above with NBT AL Proficient..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Social Science in Philosophy, Politics and Economics
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For several creative programmes, portfolio or audition performance is a leading indicator for admission.
Eligible applicant group: All applicants.
Admission band used: Band A.
Admission outcome: Guaranteed admission.
Score requirement: FPS 450 or above.

Notes: NSC endorsed for degree study or matric exemption is required.; Academic Literacy NBT score at Proficient level is required.; Quantitative Literacy NBT score at Upper Intermediate or above is required.; No lower Band B or Band C route is listed in the table..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Social Work
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For several creative programmes, portfolio or audition performance is a leading indicator for admission.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in targeted redress categories.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: FPS 380 or above.

Additional requirements: Applicants may be required to attend an admissions interview; Applicants may need to demonstrate that they will meet the professional requirements of the South African Council for Social Service Professionals.

Notes: NSC endorsed for degree study or matric exemption is required.; Academic Literacy NBT score at Intermediate Level is required for possible admission.; Probable admission: WPS 450 or above with NBT AL Upper Intermediate or above.; Guaranteed admission: FPS 450 or above with NBT AL Proficient..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts in Fine Art
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For several creative programmes, portfolio or audition performance is a leading indicator for admission.
Eligible applicant group: All applicants.
Admission band used: Possible admission.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: FPS 380 or above.
Additional requirements: Satisfactory performance in a portfolio evaluation.

Notes: NSC endorsed for degree study or matric exemption is required.; Academic Literacy NBT score at Intermediate Level or above is required.; The leading indicator for admission is performance in the portfolio submission, and places are awarded on merit.; South African applicants in targeted redress categories who are below the minimum requirements but excel in the portfolio evaluation may be considered for admission to the extended BA(FA)..

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Music
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
FPS is the Faculty Points Score.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For several creative programmes, portfolio or audition performance is a leading indicator for admission.
Eligible applicant group: All applicants.
Admission band used: Possible admission.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: FPS 380 or above.
Additional requirements: Satisfactory performance in an audition.

Notes: NSC endorsed for degree study is required.; Academic Literacy NBT score at Intermediate Level or above is required.; The leading indicator for admission is performance in the audition, and places are awarded on merit.; South African applicants in targeted redress categories below the minimum requirements who excel in the audition may be considered for a Foundation programme or the Diploma in Music Performance..
Additional subject or selection requirements: NSC_Music: 60% or above; Unisa_Music_Theory: Grade V or above; Unisa_Music_Practical: Grade VII or above.

notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.

WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.

Notes: Academic Literacy NBT score at Intermediate Level is required.; The leading indicator for admission is performance in the audition, and places are awarded on merit..
